summary: Vacuous-PASS confirmed. The D4 bundle paper draft contains zero \includegraphics directives, zero figure environments, and zero figure cross-references; the papers/D4/figures/ directory is empty. The recent (2026-05-23) Phase 6t Path A Option C lift into §9.3-9.5 is pure mathematical prose. All nine D4 anchors (six core + two Stage-13-specific + one new Phase 6t) are textual/categorical or theorem-grounded and do not structurally require a figure to be falsifiable. Source-paper-side figures (paper9: 5, paper14: 5, paper18: 1, paper35: 1, note_rt_ch_bounds: 1) are illustrative companions for their original venues and are not load-bearing for the D4 bundle's central claim (topological-quantum-computation categorical foundations + cross-bridges).
recommendations: Future advisory: if the cross-bridge to D3 §9 (QEC-MTC) is ever upgraded to include a quantitative-comparison anchor (e.g., code-distance vs. fusion-spectrum across both bundles), revisit whether a shared figure should be co-lifted into D4 §7 to make the cross-bridge visually verifiable. Current round: not required.
